title: EQ - Tap on button to change presets, blurred screen
scenario: EQ preset picker dialog blurs the background screen when selecting Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap the picker button to change EQ presets (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ)
expected: The EQ preset picker dialog opens and the background screen remains clear and visible.
